# すばらしきSteamゲームの本棚 / The Wonderful Steam Game Shelf

> Steamのおすすめインディーゲームを紹介するダッシュボード。割引情報、レビュースコア、プレイ時間などを一覧表示。毎日自動更新。

## Site Info

- URL: https://steam.subara3.com/
- Author: 頻子 (Hinko) / 栖王ヴァルハラ３丁目
- Languages: Japanese, English
- Update frequency: Daily (automated via Steam API)
- Content type: Game reviews, price tracking, discount alerts

## Main Content

### Game Dashboard
A curated list of 50+ recommended Steam games with real-time pricing, discount information, review scores, and metacritic ratings.
- https://steam.subara3.com/

### Game Reviews (Articles)
Character dialogue-style game reviews featuring unique perspectives on each game. Available in Japanese and English.
- https://steam.subara3.com/articles/balatro.html
- https://steam.subara3.com/articles/stardew-valley.html
- https://steam.subara3.com/articles/undertale.html
- (and more - see sitemap.xml for full list)

### English Articles
- https://steam.subara3.com/articles/en/balatro.html
- https://steam.subara3.com/articles/en/stardew-valley.html
- https://steam.subara3.com/articles/en/undertale.html

## Data Sources

- Game data: Steam Web API (daily snapshots)
- Pricing: Steam Store API
- Reviews: Steam user reviews aggregation

## Related Sites

- Main site: https://subara3.com/
- Kindle Sale Shelf: https://books.subara3.com/
